prompt: TRUE chunky pixel-art ability icon only, exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large. Split Volley: three thick arrows fanning outward from one central release point, immediately readable as an all-enemies physical volley. Compact centered group about 26–28 logical pixels wide. CRITICAL: leave generous solid #ff00ff magenta margin on ALL four sides — at least FOUR full magenta cells of clearance; subject must NOT touch any canvas edge. Clean flat pixels, shafts at least 3 pixels, selective one-pixel charcoal-plum outline, upper-left light. Use forest green, warm brown-orange, steel blue heads, cream fletching; source-local colors without Moonberry/Fowl limits. Solid #ff00ff background only. No bowman, words, UI frame, landscape, cast shadow, soft aura, many loose arrows, gradients, anti-aliasing, blur, dithering, watermark, or transparency.

color_reduce.note: Task-local flat-fill cluster so source-local legend stays within A–Z/a–z/0–9 grid alphabet; rebuild is from committed source.grid, not provider raw.
